changes_this_session.description: ADR-V2-005 Tool Sandbox Container — Session级工具容器隔离设计
Dockerfile 改为基于现有镜像重建 + v2 proto stubs + mcp 依赖
mock-scada 新增 SSE transport (--transport sse --port 18090)
新建 mcp_bridge.py: McpBridge SSE客户端 + inject_mcp_tools monkey-patch + resolve_mcp_sse_urls env解析
Initialize 自动连接MCP SSE servers + ConnectMCP真实实现 + skill prose注入 via ephemeral_system_prompt
hermes config fallback链 HERMES_* → OPENAI_* (去掉OPENROUTER_API_KEY)
L4 l1_client.py 添加 hermes-runtime endpoint 映射 (127.0.0.1:50053)
hermes-runtime改为Docker容器启动 + mock-scada SSE独立服务 + 状态表更新
新增 test_mcp_bridge.py (10 tests): tool proxy, env resolution, injection, config fallback
三个 runtime 的 memory hook 从只写 anchor 改为同时写 anchor + memory_file，使 FTS5 索引可被 memory_search 搜到

test_counts.grid_runtime: 97 pass + 2 ignored (95 existing + 2 hook deny integration)

design_decisions_this_session: ADR-V2-005: Sibling Container + Network MCP (SSE) for tool sandbox isolation
hermes-runtime LLM fallback: HERMES_* → OPENAI_* (not OPENROUTER_*)
mock-scada dual transport: stdio (default, for grid/claude runtimes) + SSE (for containerized runtimes)
MCP tool injection via monkey-patch model_tools + run_agent handle_function_call
L2 memory 工具注入: Phase 0.5 各 runtime 各自实现 (grid/claude PostToolUse hook 自动写, hermes L2MemoryToolProxy REST); Phase 1 统一为 L2 实现 SSE MCP transport + L4 ConnectMCP 统一下发
SKILL.md 加自主工作流指示: agent 必须端到端完成，不停下等用户确认
